name: Ofx Group Limited
analysis: OFX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.5900, stop A$0.5098, target A$0.6650 (0.94:1) — then trail it.
